mano_cua.result_summary: H1标题的Plus和Block Tunes按钮与文字垂直中心偏差约15px（按钮偏上），H2偏差3-4px基本正常，H3/H4对齐良好。大标题级别存在明显对齐bug
mano_cua.last_reasoning: H1 heading toolbar buttons at y≈180 while text vertical center at y≈195, difference ~15px above center. H2 buttons close to centered (~3-4px offset). H3/H4 alignment good. Clear alignment bug for large heading levels.
